merged_prs.title: Miscellaneous updates for modules targeting CDC reconstruction at HLT
Adding GEM MEs to per-LS scope in Offline DQM
Add filter to skip events without scouting objects in ScoutingNano for ScoutingPFMonitor dataset
Only use CPUTimer in XrdRequestManager debugging

fix `TrackToTrackComparisonHists` logic for cosmics

MTD geometry: fix for geometry navigation issues in scenario D119
Allowing No Golden and Run Based Skim Option of `das-up-to-nevents.py`
Add UParT_V01 model Sonic producer and fix a bug in miniAOD_tools.py
New constructor for the SoAView and aggregate method for Collections
Phase2-hgx363A Update the dd4hep versions of V19 algorithms of HGCal geometry
Allow RelVal workflows to use RNTuple
Map unknown exit codes to PlatformStatus.PlatformNotAvailable

Move RandomNumberGenerator service base class to `FWCore/AbstractServices`

add `dqmInfoHLTMon` to `offlineHLTSource` in `DQMOffline_Trigger_cosmics` and enable `showHLTGlobalTag`

set `crossedBoundary_` only for classVersion 12 of the `SimTrack`
[FULLSIM] Set enable EM physics library G4HepEM by default

Print diagnostics on ProductResolver's loadTag setIntervalFor and IOVProxy's fetchSequence
Add protection if non-existent geometry is used

Update on GEM offlineDQM Cluster plots

Using Offline GT for 2024 Data RelVals Eras B,C,D,E

Remove `edm::GetPassID()` as obsolete
Add a test for missing dictionaries with CUDA headers
